## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Why

Explain the problem this pull request solves.

## Related References

Link related issues, documents, or standards references.

## Change Type

- [ ] Documentation clarification
- [ ] Messaging or naming update
- [ ] Asset addition or asset organization update

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the affected brand guidance before changing it
- [ ] I updated related documents, references, or asset metadata where needed
- [ ] I did not invent unofficial capabilities or unsupported product claims
- [ ] I avoided duplicate assets and ambiguous file names
- [ ] My changes stay focused on one coherent brand problem
